conversation.text: cant we just build this with chatgpt and zapier
Yeah those work for basic stuff. Where they fall short is tone, they sound generic and customers notice. They also don't plug into a proper qualification flow or your CRM
hmm hadnt thought of the tone thing
Yeah it's the difference between a customer feeling like they're talking to a template versus someone who sounds like your team. That's what we build specifically
Have you tried anything like that before or would this be the first time?
Makes sense. Your ecommerce leads, are they mainly coming through the website or are you running ads too?
And what happens when they come in, is there a team on it or is it more manual?
manual mostly, we've got a small team but they cant keep up
Yeah 200 a month with a small team, stuff's going to slip through. Before I send you a booking link, anything you want to know first?
how long does it take to set up

Usually 2 to 3 weeks depending on scope. Louis goes through all that on the call. He's the founder, handles all the strategy side
https://calendly.com/markeye/free-discovery-call
